A newer version of Gradle than 9.2.1 is available: 9.4.1
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.

`activity_registration.xml` has more than 10 levels, bad for performance

Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)

fix-composite.description: Make borderless

incident.message: Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)

fix-composite.description: Make borderless
